content:
Other options are switching out Agrippa for Ogier or Erica. Erica's benefit is Vulnerable Application On-Demand Burst turn and more Keyflare. Ogier's benefit is more Str Stacking and Shielding. Agrippa's benefit is Permanent Alert and mixing Caro means Embryos for free 30 Aliemus. 

If possible, you want to run a "Dmg Amp" Wheel on Castor as that works with his passive. For Winkle, you ideally want to switch to a "Keyflare Regen" WoD since she is a Skey Generator. You probably also want "Steppenwolf" Covenant on Castor(Just like Pollux).
Castor Wheel is a +2 Handsize wheel, which is..... just always good... <:takenotes:1357186646294138890> <:pray:1356053116260454534> <:Cheerup:1400771555939844149>
Also, don't worry about pinging me, but I do have discord notifs turned off. However, I will respond as soon as I can~ <:bow:1356053037159944473>

definitely! i think she adds great utility to this team with caro mechanics, card dupes and some more embryo/str/vul/weakness which can help u survive longer while pollux or castor stack on sin marks/onyx plumes
Gonna try these later thanks guys!
8-10 is a pain tho
ayy that's perfect, likewise i think if i can help anyone o/

i think u got this, potential spoiler for tips :
||- remember to use the throw away other awakers cards and draw as many random ones orison more if ure not using it, i was personally using the card duping one mostly but the good cards u could get from the other one can be pretty good AND they retain after a round, so u could keep some that are really neat in deck for later like a 2+ barrier or adv. insight, double possee etc.
- you can stall the boss on phase one a bit to get castor and pollux going with sin marks because of how u change their attack intention every card u play.
- keep in mind that the mechanic card heals a little and u get a healing option from hameln's support at one point, u can manage once u memorize the fight better.
- save up an AoE turn to get rid of the boss spawn that purifies them since it can get rid of a lot of work like bleed, vul/weakness stacks...etc and personally i found times they purified the boss sat me back a lot.
- timing ultra rounds for the boss spawn phase and last phase can be increadibly helpful.||
good luck! you got this <:pray:1356053116260454534>
castor team set up? just working on building up units right now, can e3 castor so dw about that >_<

Core: Castor/Jenkin/Winkle

You can go Pure or Mono Ultra. Both have 100% Dmg/Shield/Aliemus/Everything, during Ultra Turn. For Mono, you can go Erica, as she gives you more Skey with On-Demand Vulnerable for Burst turn. For Pure, you can go Ogier, as he can apply a 2 turn Vuln, with a Shield Exalt, and stack STR. Mixing Ultra with Chaos(Ogier) also gives you extra benefits as mixing Chaos with any other realm. For (Pure) Ultra, you get 10% more Crit Dmg(there is probably more that I forgot). Furthermore, Chaos gives 100% DR for free. For Mono*, I'm not sure, but I think you don't gain more benefits.
thanks ^^
No problem~ <:goodjob:1400771550097051669>
wait, didnt mixing units cause ultra to get less damage on ultra rounds? :O

Morning lovely people. I guess I should just push the story for now anyway, but the question will still stand...What am I looking for in Summons? 😅

welcome! yeah the story is nice and i recommend reading through even if the translations get a bit off at times haha,
i genuinely think most important thing to do at first is to look for which character looks cool and/or try them out in character trails, once u have 1-2 characters u like you can build around them

also id recommend not worrying too much about builds or tierlists online, its not a game where u have to be scared of bricking your account because of not having an optimal team at all, its difficult but 95% of the content is doable with even just the standard team

People play gacha for a few things

Story 
Or nice character s
gambling
There's quite a bunch of banners....which ones should I look at? I guess I can do some pulls somewhere even without knowing which characters I'm looking for rn?
I play gachas to get trolled and rolled by devs during my summon sessions 😭
For now wait for anni, since Kaleido and timeless are going away in 24 hours. Go for Castor or Pollux if you like what they look like
No real problem if you spam standard

yes, as someone who never really saved up for one character im doing great and i didnt even use the rerolls properly because i didnt know how they work.
plenty of nice characters but mainly you should never spend silver on the standard banner,
and save it for character specific banners.
and i recommend starting with the standard banner, you will get plenty of pulls on it from playing a few story chapters and doing daily tasks here and there
This lady will get a rerun in a few days
Shes super good but gameplay will deduct a few years from your life
Also didn't realize her hair is so long
tawil is very good yeah, still i recommend looking at the select options u have, and see who looks cool to you

So what if their terrible. You pull their best support to make them good<:point:1356053112292511815> 

Go for looks, not gameplay
once u have 1-2 characters that look cool and you want them, you can build the rest of the team around them
Soo...do I just spend 158 cores here? This is the only use for them right?
Click realms to change
Look at other realms
You might like Aequor, Caro or Ultra more
yes but also there are almost no terrible characters, the only characters that might be very hard to do well with are standard characters and even those with enough dupes can be okay
yes, but remember to not spend silver here, save it for premium banner pulls
chaos is nice but do scroll around and check all the characters for whichever team looks the coolest
Team building is usually like DPS / Sub-dps / 2 supports (one might be healer for late game content)?
remember you can mix 2 realms as well, so you dont have to build a whole team on one realm as well
Regarding those...Do I ignore those for now? Characters are priority anyway? Or not?
Their good but you want more Awakeners first
You'll use R wheels for arc 1
And you will love them
I guess this is a standart banner for wheels. Do I ignore it as well and just spend the cores in Realm Study? Where's the point when I should I look for wheels more than characters?

> Roles:
> 
> Assault = damage and nukes
> 
> Chorus = buffs, debuffs and/or heals
> 
> Warden = Sustain
> 
> Realms:
> 
> Chaos - good overall, and death resistance essentially giving you free revives if things go south
> 
> Tentacles - Tentacles deals damage every after round and gain 1 more tentacle to a max of 5 (can be extended), can give shield or do more damage at the cost of losing a tentacle
> 
> Embryo - generate embryo that gives ultimates faster, and a healing tank you can use whenever u want that recarges slowly every turn
> 
> Ultra - First card used each turn will appear in the Ultra bar, on 5 cards you get a free turn where you will draw the 5 cards you saved
yes, and u can also get to choose which wheel you would most likely get which is nice, but for now characters are waaaay more important
Tentacles sound like the most fun
You go to wheel jail once you have e3 or all the needed copies from standard
It's when "okay, I don't any more of you for now."
E3 is this one right, enlightenment feature?
yes o/
When you get outcast that's e3.

I have to do chores now<:cry2:1356068126894194758> 
Ellumi very helpful I have not seen them in other channels lol
having E0~E3 can heavily change a character so checking those out for premium banner characters is useful
thank you, good luck with the chores! :p
anything beyond E3 is unnecessary, but you would get it on a few standard units because the game is generous with standard pulls

I'll look into some character trials, but If I end up choosing Caecus (This guy can be a main dmg dealer as well right?), I should look for 3 more characters into his team, but outside of that, do I look for the opportunity to build several different teams or I choose the main dmg dealer and build only one team around him/her for now?
unfortunately it's kind of hard to get aequor dd right now since they are limited units, most people starting with caecus will use him with nautila for a defensive team that deals dmg with counter
that is a very reliable duo that can easily clear early-midgame
starting out you only build one team to push story until you unlock the mode that requires 5 teams and accumulate enough resources to build those secondary teams

building several teams comes naturally with time i believe, since you will find more and more characters interesting, but its nothing u should worry about yet until a few months into the game if you vibe with it

Hmm...so for example Caecus/Nautila, those two can be found in Realm Study. Do I just spend all cores in aequor realm to get Caecus to E3 (need to get Nautila first though), or what's the best plan?
Also, what would the other 2 characters be into such team?
that aside, you can get tulu, an aequer damage dealer on a low drop chance from standard banner, and aurita, free aequer damage dealer

i think if caecus is the most interesting for you currently, pulling on aequer first would help since even if u dont get duplicates of him you'll get other aequer units and more chances of getting tulu or murphy
each standard banner now has a small chance to get two previously limited-only awakers like 24, lily on chaos, murphy tulu aequer, sorel salvador caro, daffodil ultra i believe
yea if you get lucky with tulu you can build around him
and aurita as well, she's free and pretty strong
aurita, aigis and erica are character u unlock from story mode i believe so youre guaranteed to have them in a bit
so keep pulling aequer and see what happens, i think that would be a good plan
the other teammates are kind of flexible, you can use goliath ramona ogier sanga... any support really
Whats the best team for 24 I should start looking into, im on chapter 7 now and have been using 24 goliathh caecuus nautila

Hey friends, can anyone help me figure out where I should go with what I have, and who I should be trying to pull? I've been running a pure counter team of Nautila/Caecus/Pandia/whoever I feel like trying at the time, but I feel like that's not going to work forever... can I make anything else good from what I've got?

Is there any place where I can look for recommended Enlightenments? As far as I understand from ur messages, once I get needed Enlightenments from standart banners, I go to Wheels Standart Banner and basically never leave it for a good amount of time?
Within Standart Chaos banner, the only one worth getting is Nautila, right? 
Within Aequor: Caecus/Goliath?
Within Caro and Ultra...not sure if anyone from in there is needed later.
Also...I thought any SR character could be acquired through Standart Banner, but I don't see Ramona there...How do you get copies of her?
free copies when you level up
there are also some characters in the shops that aren't on the banner
Thanks!
Yeah, with the SR and freebie characters (Aurita, Aigis, and Erica) you generally get their extra copies from shops or leveling instead of pulling them.
Update: I just pulled Tulu, so I assume I should just build an Aequor team...
well u dont have to be so strict, but as you play you'll have a better understanding of what might work well or how good an enlightenment is for a character
some are barely noticeable while others completely change the characters potential
ayyy nice, not necessarily but if you wanted to for a while it could be fun to try
remember you have plenty of resources to build more than 1 team throughout the game
Mixing Aequor or Caro, yes, but Chaos mixed with anything only gives benefits to the realm.

I would recommend to pull:
Chaos: Nautila/Karen
Aequor: Celeste/Caecus/Goliath
Caro: Faint
Ultra: Jenkin/Winkle/Casiah

Dont forget you have standard selectors, so if you dont wanna pull Caro, but still want Faint, you can just selector her. Then you dont need to RNG on Standard Caro Banner, wasting pulls

For wheels(WoDs), I wouldn’t recommended pulling each characters “Signature Wheel”, but rather wheels that are just best for each role(Dps/Support/Survive)
The No.1 WoD everyone recommends is +12 Titan’s Blade for Dps
The No.1 WoD for Support is +12 Incalculable Favor

Other WoDs you might want are Path Forsaken/Bloody Feast/Chains Unbound/Fin of Sorrow/Death of Miss Coral/Memory Spiral

^ This is copy and pasted. If there are further questions or adjustments. Feel free to ask <:happy:1356053849894420683>
I could help you assemble a team(or few, D-Tide). It would be greatly appreciated, if you could send all your Awakeners available, from each Realm. (Tulu could be a option to explore).

Caro: More Crimsum Furnace Healing/When Chaos units Exalt, gain Embryo Percentage

Ultra: Gain 10% Crit Dmg/100% Effectiveness During Ultra Turn

Mono Chaos is popular due to infinite cycle at high invest Awakeners. Hameln/Tawil/Karen/Ryker.

Aequor Tawil is popular due to Caecus, and Tawil Exalt with any Aequor Awakeners Cards have uses. Aequor also having Red Stance to work with Tawil’s Wings are insane dps.

Caro Tawil is much more rare due to opportunity loss of running her not in Chaos or Aequor. However, I have seen her in Discover Comps with Pickman.

Ultra Tawil is almost a never. I’ve only seen people talk about using her as a sub for Horla.

Like in a curious manner <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>

Do I focus on getting Caecus to E3 first while also looking for Goliath E2(?) and then going to Wheel Standard Banner or what would be the plan? Since you have listed quite a few characters, getting all of them and also the resources for all of them might not be a good plan for a newbie? Or it is?

I would say, follow the advice. Try to get a copy of each character, and selector them if you want. Further Enlightenments are situational. Read each Enlightenment and think of a situation where you would want it, or think about what it provides. Is it worth it, or provides enough Value to use your pulls for. You don’t need to level them or use skill mats on them until you need them for a comp/team.
Later in the game, you will unlock a game mode that requires 19 Awakeners anyway, and what I recommended you from the Standard Banner is only 7 or 8 Awakeners.

Lastly, try to make a main team that can clear story mode Arc 1 (Chapter 1 to 7). Then when you reach 8, I would recommend trying to clear the lowest difficulty endgame mode called D-Tide. Once you can clear D-Tide in some form or another, push to finish Chapter 8 and 9. Then you can focus on D-Tide pushing for higher difficulty and more rewards by creating and leveling and clearing with your 4-5 teams.
<@510949582499217411> Keep the questions coming!(While I can answer them… <:Feelguilty:1400771618174664775>)
Haven't slept for 33 hours, my brain is a bit fried already. Thanks for the detailed responses, I'll ask some more questions after my 💤💤😴
Please rest up! <:pray:1356053116260454534>
Oh, lemme clarify. Arc 1 is Chapter 1 to 9. However after Chapter 7, beginning of 8, you wanna think about D-Tide.

Your team right now would be Caecus/Goliath/Tulu/Murphy. The characters I recommend pulling are: Chaos: Karen/Nautila - Caro: Faint - Ultra: Jenkin/Winkle.
Also, I dont normally add people when I meet them only once. Sorry, bout that~ <:bow:1356053037159944473>
Maybe in due time. I hope you can understand. <:pray:1356053116260454534>
Got it, thanks a lot! After pulling at least one copy of those, do I go to Wheels? Or some Enhancements for them?

You can pull for the characters I recommended. You can switch to WoDs(Wheels). You can push main story. I would say Enlightenments vary too much for different teams, and necessities, and you truly have to read and see the value for yourself.
I can tell you the general, “good” Enlightenments, but you’ll have to judge for yourself.
Caecus E3/Goliath E2/Tulu E1/Murphy E1
what do you guys think i should pull for to help with dtide. I currently plan on resetting agrippa for winkle/uvhash dupe the next time we are allowed to reset.
^ This. If you ever need a full refresher on what you would want to get.

Hmm...I could technically keep pulling on them to get their Enlightenments, but It's probably better to get the characters you recommend first and later either come back to Aequor or go to Wheels, right?
Pollux Wheel is a solid dps wheel on every dps, not just Pollux. <:agree:1400771815076528258>
So good pick?

I think you are overthinking and overcomplicating things for yourself right now, ahahaaha! I would recommend pushing story, and seeing how far you can go without, better WoDs or more Enlightenments or “better” teams. See far you can get for now~ <:pray:1356053116260454534>

Btw Kat, thanks to your building advice from a couple of days ago, I managed to get 5 teams and push all D-Tide 1 stages for the first time!!!

Everyone starts somewhere~
Yeah maybe u are right, It's just I don't wanna be stuck somewhere due to me pulling what's not really needed <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>
Proud of ya for being able to take the first step in D-Tide and completing it. Keep pushing forth! <:wink:1400771743630491749>
By the way, I got both Tulu and Murphy in x5 pull XD. Still have 45 pure cores left.

I can understand that, but its not exactly possible to “brick” your account in general. Especially if you follow what I said above~. If you are really worried, then don’t use all your resources, and slow drip in what is needed to push further into the story. I can tell you know that the WoDs(I recommended will always be used, namely Titan’s Blade and Incalculable Favor). I can also tell you that Caecus, Goliath, Murphy are both used in the endgame mode, “D-Tide” always. Tulu is the only case where you want OE(OverExalt), but even then, you can use him right now, and he can be used in lower difficulty of “D-Tide”. So don’t stress too much, and try to have some fun~! <:bow:1356053037159944473> <:goodjob:1400771550097051669> <:U_power:1400771817659957258>

When you have 7 copies of a Awakener, you unlock their OE(Overexalt). Overexalts require 200 Aliemus instead of 100 Aliemus to use. It a upgraded version and more powerful version, of their Exalt.
Ahh....
Those do exist, and only come from events and special occasions.
Ohh and while you are here, the energy...do I just spend it on something I don't have atm like character exp etc? Since it's 300/300 atm and I don't want it to be wasted while I'm doing the story.
You can use it on Mats for Lvls or Skill Lvls or Edify Mats. If you have Event unlocked and can do the first difficulty, then that would be best.

Another one will start in it’s place as soon as it ends.
Mhm mhm. Is this your first gacha game perchance?

It's not, have been playing some gachas before. Like Guardian Tales (was at the very top of player base), Etheria Restart and stuff. 
But I'm asking the questions exactly due to my experience of other gachas, since some of them vary a lot in their team building and use of resources.
It's like Etheria needs you to buy a lot of energy with the gems, which is not the case for most gachas since that currency is mostly used on summons.
Better safe than sorry <:M_satisfy:1400771690321154110>
It's the first card-based game I'm playing though.
<@510949582499217411> Understandable. I’ll be here to answer any questions when I can.
You’ll fine that this game is very strategy based, cause it is a card game.
As for the summon currency (don't remember the name), but the one you buy special cores for limited summons with...do I just save them for now since I already have some characters for Act 1?

My help and knowledge can only get you so far, as a player. Further then that, you need to be able to understand what your Awakeners do, how you want to play them, their roles, how they synergies for a burst turn, what their cards and Exalt do, priority of actions, etc.

Premium currency - Silver
Premium pulls - Luminous Core
Standard pulls - Silver Core(I think)
For Silver, only use it for Luminous Cores, which are for Limited Awakeners.

As you experience more diversity of Realms, Mixing Realms, Awakeners, WoDs, Relics. I’m sure you’re brain will start connecting the dots on how you want things to run. What works with which Awakener. What relics you want for each comp. So on and so forth~

I just noticed that the energy went to 302/300. In the description it's written that the cap is 3000. If it still continues to refill beyond the written 300 number, what's the point of it? <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>
Energy pass 300 takes 12 min for 1, versus normally 6 min for 1.
Yeah, those things naturally come if you stick to the game...<:pray:1356053116260454534>

Read the talents of the Awakeners and see if they benefit from a certain main stat(Sigil Yield, Damage Amplification). Then proceed to determine if that matters or not, the talent/passive. Dps mainly run Crit Rate/Crit Dmg/Dmg Amp. Supports mainly run Skey/Aliemus. Of course, some  Awakeners don’t follow that cause of how they function, and their passive.

If you’re in Arc 1, always run “Frenzy” and “Gluttony”, as these two Brown/R wheels makes Arc 1, alottttt easier.  “Frenzy” gives you the ability to buy cursed relics, and as you should know by now, they are broken. “Gluttony” allows you to forgo a Orison for a Percentage of Max Hp increase, which makes White Tentacle Stance Shield and Crimsum Furnace, shield/heal more. Even if you’re not running Aequor or Caro realm, the max Hp will still help with surviving and healing more Hp to work with a Junctions.
Teams seen there are functional

The first Onyx Plume, per enemy, will apply Corrosion stacks, further Onyx Plumes won’t apply more. Once you eat them all(Corrosion Stacks), the poof. His Rouse, makes it so his Crit Rate is 100%, further Onyx Plumes on the same target stack Corrosion, and retain shield on Onyx Plumes are +50%.
